leader.name: Vikram Sakhare
leader.bio: Vikram Sakhare is dedicated to local governance, people-first development, and transparent public service in Hinjewadi Grampanchayat.
leader.vision: A cleaner, smarter, and inclusive Hinjewadi where every family has access to quality roads, water, health, and opportunities.
leader.mission: To strengthen village infrastructure, empower youth and women, and build responsive governance through regular public engagement.

achievements.title: Local Road Upgradation Drive
achievements.description: Focused efforts to repair and improve key internal village roads for safer mobility.

achievements.title: Water Access Coordination
achievements.description: Strengthened local supply planning and citizen coordination for steady water access.

achievements.title: Community Cleanliness Campaign
achievements.description: Launched regular cleanliness drives with youth volunteers and local ward teams.
